description: AI Insight Null-State UX (Contact)  -  Add Run AI Analysis button when aiInsight is null on Contact detail page. Lead detail already done 2026-03-04. Pattern: amber dashed-border banner + button wired to scoreWithAI mutation. Invalidate query on success. Follows IFC-095 (Pattern 2  -  scope oversight). Resolves WIRE-IFC-095-001.

test_coverage.actual: IFC-220-specific code 100% covered (7 targeted tests). Overall page.tsx 49% stmts (pre-existing 2500-line monolith).

validations.name: TypeScript
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json

validations.name: Tests
validations.command: npx vitest run src/app/contacts --reporter=verbose && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec npx vitest run src/modules/contact/__tests__/contact.router.test.ts --reporter=verbose

validations.name: Lint
validations.command: npx eslint src/app/contacts/[id]/page.tsx src/app/contacts/[id]/__tests__/page.test.tsx && npx eslint src/modules/contact/contact.router.ts src/modules/contact/__tests__/contact.router.test.ts

notes: scoreWithAI tRPC mutation added to contact.router.ts. ContactAiPendingState updated with isPending prop, amber dashed-border styling, Run AI Analysis button. 10 frontend + 46 backend tests passing. Regression suite (intelligence router 41/41) green.
